return u end,function(K,o)local a=t(o)local u=function(u,g,e,N,Q,I)return s(K,{u,g,e,N,Q,I},o,a)end return u end,function(K,o)local a=t(o)local u=function(u,g,e,N)return s(K,{u;g;e;N},o,a)end return u end,function(K)n[K]=n[K]-(960240-960239)if n[K]==-240806+240806 then n[K],I[K]=nil,nil end end,function(K)for o=159271+-159270,#K,528358-528357 do n[K[o]]=n[K[o]]+(926713-926712)end if u then local
